suggestions.title: Write a 2000 word story
suggestions.prompt: Write a 2000 word story in the third person focussing on {{owner}}'s live in one of the places {{he}} lived. Be creative, but also be true to {{owner}}'s nature and the relationship {{he}} has with any people you mention. Use the get_all_chat_messages_by_contact() tool, search_emails_by_content() tool and search_emails_by_contact() tool to get context and to understand the relationships with people who might be involved. The story should involve at least 2 conversations with different people and one with 4 four that {{owner}} knows. Any dialog should be in the style of Aaron Sorkin. The story should take place over 6 months have have 2 plotlines that run through the entire thread of the story, but do not refer to the plotlines in the story or the 6 month period. The story should not reference work other than in passing and should relate to non work activities. If possible refer to events happening in the wider world.
